{ "name": "path-exists", "version": "4.0.0", "description": "Check if a path exists", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/path-exists", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "sindresorhus.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=8" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "path", "exists", "exist", "file", "filepath", "fs", "filesystem", "file-system", "access", "stat" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^1.4.1", "tsd": "^0.7.2", "xo": "^0.24.0" } }
